title: GhostBlock
description: Gives you the ability to give yourself ghost block and other cool features CLIENT-SIDE
body:
# GhostBlock Latest Version Features: (1.7)
Allows you to give yourself ghost items!
`/clientgive <item> <amount>`
Example:
`/clientgive bedrock 64`
`/clientfakesurvival`
Making it so you can place blocks even tho in adventure
`/clientremoveghostblock`
Remove GhostBlocks from the keybind!
**DEFAULT IS P**
![KeyBind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35ebb88f117200f16315c5c12b3b12f7aa50a705.png)
![Client Give](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yRdq2t0P/images/9bbc9565f9931313faf4454b01b895fc09989672.png)!
![Client Give Amount](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yRdq2t0P/images/9153cdd278835e716f9a5d5cb4e24c3613ef9936.png)![Client Fake Survival](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff2cd31912a06135f47d38abffed685f84639db5.png)!
![Inventory with GhostBlock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yRdq2t0P/images/1e57cfa678344d12e4053bd58f947dfea28b3ced.png)

DO NOT USE ON ANY SERVERS WHERE GHOST BLOCKS ARE NOT ALLOWED ON!!
